name: Telasi planned and unplanned electricity interruptions
executiveSummary: Official address-level operational records for current planned and unplanned electricity interruptions in Tbilisi, including affected-user counts, start and estimated restoration times, and Georgian address text.
geography: Telasi electricity distribution area in Tbilisi
updateCadence: Event-driven; tested record was created 10 minutes after its outage start
accessSummary: Unauthenticated GET returning JSON. Undocumented website backend; selectedlan=en still returned Georgian bodies.
license: Unclear; no explicit data reuse license or API terms found
recordCount: 6 current operational records and 886 archive records reported at test time

accessPoints.label: Current and archive JSON
accessPoints.notes: Parameters: contentType, pageNumber, perPage, selectedlan. No published rate limit.

schemas.name: Response wrapper
schemas.description: Current operational records under api and historical CMS notices under content.

fields.notes: Unlike api.page, observed as a string
Georgian text; observed არა and არ გადადებულა

fields.example: ირაკლი აბაშიძის ქ.,მცხეთის I შეს. I ჩიხი,...

caveats: Undocumented endpoint and no version guarantee
English selection still returned Georgian address/body content
Current and archive sections have different schemas
reliability: Returned HTTP 200 JSON in the research session
Source timestamps support ingestion-lag checks
Last-known raw response can be cached but ages quickly

name: Georgian State Electrosystem live power balance and cross-border flows
executiveSummary: Official live national grid frequency, consumption, generation by technology, aggregate import/export, and signed cross-border power-flow values. The public dashboard polls its JSON backends every 60 seconds.
geography: Georgia-wide power system and international interconnections; not neighborhood outages
updateCadence: Public page JavaScript polls every 60 seconds; its old-data threshold is 3 minutes
accessSummary: Two unauthenticated JSON GET endpoints used by the official homepage dashboard.
license: Unclear; no explicit data reuse license or API terms found
recordCount: One current frequency value, one national balance object, and seven interconnection values per response

accessPoints.label: Balance and flow JSON
accessPoints.notes: No published rate limit; page itself polls once per minute

schemas.name: Grid frequency
schemas.description: widget response; frequency unit confirmed by official dashboard.

schemas.name: National balance
schemas.description: typeSum fields; all power values displayed as MW.

fields.notes: Null during validation; always keep retrieval time
Returned by API but omitted from homepage summary table

schemas.name: Cross-border flows
schemas.description: areaSum signed MW values. Official map uses sign to change arrow direction and displays absolute magnitude.

fields.meaning: Russia flow via Salkhino-labelled interconnection, MW
Russia flow via Java-labelled interconnection, MW
Russia flow via Nakaduli-labelled interconnection, MW

caveats: National system data, not household or district outages
Sign convention should be interpreted through the official map orientation
reliability: Both endpoints returned HTTP 200 application/json
Values changed between requests
Client polling cadence and 3-minute stale threshold were verified in shipped JavaScript

name: Official hourly Tbilisi air-quality station observations
executiveSummary: Detailed official station JSON combining station identity and coordinates, pollutant definitions and units, AQI threshold bands, chart metadata, and hourly pollutant values with measurement times for five Tbilisi stations.
geography: National monitoring network; municipality_id=51 returned five Tbilisi stations
accessSummary: Unauthenticated parameterized JSON GET; trailing slash redirects/should be retained.
license: Unclear; no explicit machine-readable data license found
recordCount: 5 Tbilisi station objects in tested response

accessPoints.label: Hourly station JSON
accessPoints.notes: Select time range, station, municipality, substance, latest-only, chart, and format

fields.meaning: Pollutant definition, units, and AQI bands
Hourly concentration in parent substance unit

caveats: Automatic observations are provisional until verified
Some English/localized fields are empty or remain Georgian
A station or pollutant series can be empty/delayed
Pollutant units differ; CO used mg/m³ in the sample
reliability: Source measurement time is supplied per value
Five station objects returned for Tbilisi
Coordinates and stable-looking station codes support joins
Last-known values can be cached with original timestamps

name: NEA current-day river gauge levels
executiveSummary: Official current-day river-gauge records with station IDs, coordinates, water level, date, and warning state, including one Vere–Tbilisi gauge at Svanidze.
geography: Selected Georgian river gauges; one explicitly Tbilisi-named Vere gauge
updateCadence: Current-day/daily in tested response; rendered page showed 00:00 observation time
accessSummary: Unauthenticated JSON GET used by the official NEA river page.
license: Unclear; no explicit data license or API terms found

fields.notes: Interpretation confirmed by official rendered page despite ambiguous field name

schemas.name: Rendered page additions
schemas.description: Values visible on the official page but absent from GetRiversPin.

caveats: One Tbilisi gauge is not citywide flood coverage
Page has described river monitoring as test mode
reliability: HTTP 200 JSON returned 16 records
Official page independently confirmed level units and station thresholds
Latest value can be cached with its MeasureTime

name: NEA administrative weather-warning polygons
executiveSummary: Official machine-readable current-state warning map for 74 administrative polygons, including Tbilisi, with boundary, status color, place name, and nullable warning detail/title/icon fields.
geography: 74 administrative polygons across Georgia, including Tbilisi
updateCadence: Current-state endpoint; exact publication cadence and response measurement time are absent
accessSummary: Unauthenticated JSON GET used by the official warning map.
license: Unclear; no explicit data license or API terms found
recordCount: 74 polygon records; all had the same color and null warning detail fields at validation

accessPoints.label: Warning-map JSON
accessPoints.notes: Large full-polygons response; cache stable geometry

fields.notes: Do not assign a status label without official legend semantics

samples.label: Tbilisi warning state with geometry shortened
samples.note: Pins is deliberately shortened and is not a usable polygon fixture.

caveats: Status color semantics were not authoritatively labelled in this pass
All warning-specific fields were null at test time
Full polygons make the response large
reliability: HTTP 200 JSON returned 74 areas
Official JavaScript was inspected to confirm the fields drive the public map
Stable geometry can be separated and cached from changing warning state

name: MEPA landfill and transfer-site parcel polygons
executiveSummary: Official ArcGIS polygon layer for landfill/transfer-site parcels with cadastral code, address, site type, area, and geometry. Machine-readable but static/reference rather than live collection or bin telemetry.
provider: Ministry of Environmental Protection and Agriculture geoportal
geography: Georgia-wide; no Tbilisi-address feature found in the 47-record response
updateCadence: Unknown; no update interval in inspected metadata
accessSummary: Unauthenticated ArcGIS FeatureServer metadata and query endpoints supporting JSON/GeoJSON.
license: Unclear; layer copyrightText was empty but no explicit open license was found

fields.notes: Verify source CRS/unit before treating as square metres

fields.meaning: Parcel boundary in GeoJSON coordinate order

samples.label: Bolnisi operating landfill parcel
samples.note: Geometry coordinates omitted in compact sample.

caveats: Static infrastructure, not live waste operations
English fields were null in sample
reliability: ArcGIS layer publishes an explicit field schema
All 47 features were retrieved
Full layer is small enough to snapshot
GeoJSON output is supported

name: NEA Tbilisi multi-day weather forecast page
executiveSummary: Official server-rendered day/night forecast values for Tbilisi. Current and useful, but no reusable forecast or observation JSON endpoint was validated, so this is HTML-only rather than a live-tested API source.
updateCadence: Periodic multi-day forecast; exact issuance cadence not established
accessSummary: Unauthenticated server-rendered HTML; no reusable structured endpoint validated.
license: Unclear; no explicit data reuse license found

samples.label: Current forecast values
samples.value: 2026-07-22 night: Light Shower possibility, +21°C, Baffling Wind, 10–15 m/s; day: +34°C, West Wind, 8–13 m/s.

caveats: Condition icon alt text was not consistently populated
reliability: Official page visibly rendered values
Retrieval/server time was visible

name: National Seismic Monitoring Centre earthquake event catalog
executiveSummary: Official, frequently updated HTML event table with UTC time, local magnitude, depth, coordinates, locality description, focal mechanism when present, and a manual/automatic marker. No JSON endpoint was validated.
provider: Institute of Earth Sciences and National Seismic Monitoring Centre, Ilia State University
updateCadence: Event-driven publication; not guaranteed instant early warning
accessSummary: Unauthenticated paginated HTML; event ID is carried in detail-link query parameter.
license: Publicly posted occurrence information, but no explicit open-data license found

schemas.name: Event table row
schemas.description: Official HTML table columns plus event ID from URL.

samples.label: Event 585885 normalized from HTML
samples.note: Normalized illustration, not a native JSON response.

caveats: Some region and focal-mechanism cells are blank
Not a prediction or guaranteed early-warning feed
reliability: Official table and latest-event detail were page-verified
UTC is explicit in source column

name: Roads Department national-road restrictions and works notices
executiveSummary: Official event-driven notices about national-road closures, restrictions, clearing works, and restoration of traffic. Relevant to Tbilisi access routes, but not a municipal-street or traffic-speed feed and available only as HTML in this pass.
geography: Georgian national roads; not comprehensive for Tbilisi municipal streets
accessSummary: Unauthenticated paginated HTML list/detail pages; no machine-readable endpoint validated.
license: Unclear; no explicit data reuse license found
recordCount: 3 current list items rendered at validation

schemas.name: Notice list item
schemas.description: Fields extractable from the HTML list/detail pages.

samples.label: Current list item
samples.value: uid=1784537836; published=20 July, 2026 12:56:56; title=ქუთაისი–წყალტუბო–ცაგერი–ლენტეხი–ლასდილის საავტომობილო გზაზე გაწმენდითი სამუშაოები გრძელდება

caveats: Some detail pages had little body text
National roads rather than municipal streets
reliability: Official current list rendered three entries
Stable-looking UID detail links

name: GWP Tbilisi water-supply interruption notices
executiveSummary: The official GWP public page exposes searchable operational notices with affected places and expected timing, but direct access timed out and no reusable endpoint or live sample was validated in this session.
testedAt: 2026-07-22 research session; direct request timed out
accessSummary: Public searchable page; reusable request schema unresolved and direct command-line request timed out.

schemas.name: Page-visible notice fields
schemas.description: Reported fields visible in public notices; exact selectors/schema were not live-tested.

caveats: Expected restoration is not confirmed restoration
Third-party planned-work mirrors may miss emergencies
reliability: Official avenue identified
Indexed/public UI supports date/address search

name: Tbilisi Municipal Services Map operational and reference layers
executiveSummary: Official map visibly catalogs temporary traffic schemes, street rehabilitation, transport, parking, applications, cadastral, boundary, greenery, and hydrography layers. Candidate backend paths named in the public client all returned 404 to direct tests, so record schemas remain unresolved.
updateCadence: Mixed: operational for traffic/works, reference for cadastral/boundary layers
accessSummary: Public interactive map. JavaScript API base and method names found, but direct GET and POST tests returned 404.

schemas.name: Known catalog/UI state only
schemas.description: Not a record schema; fields exposed by public map navigation/catalog.

caveats: Do not invent fields from client method names
reliability: Official map and layer catalog were page-verified
Candidate API base and paths were extracted from shipped JavaScript

name: Tbilisi regulated parking-space inventory
executiveSummary: Official pages and ordinance PDFs define zonal parking places and capacities, but no public feed for live occupancy, available spaces, payments, or vehicles was found.
accessSummary: Public web pages and PDF ordinance tables; no live occupancy endpoint found.

schemas.name: Ordinance parking row
schemas.description: Representative official PDF columns; exact headings vary by ordinance.

reliability: Official portal and ordinance publication route identified
